_comment: Desired branch protection for main. The craftsmanship check is a REQUIRED status with no override path (ADR-0045: no human override). enforce_admins=true closes the bypass. Applied by scripts/apply-branch-protection.sh in Phase 4, AFTER the golden set calibrates BLOCK precision (B-EP11.6) — until then the craftsmanship job is advisory (continue-on-error) so it cannot wedge the PRs that build it.
